title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 285.515 - Penalties for violations
text:
285.515.  Penalties for violations. — If a court determines that an employer has knowingly misclassified a worker, the court shall enter a judgment in favor of the state and award penalties in the amount of fifty dollars per day per misclassified worker up to a maximum of fifty thousand dollars.  The attorney general may enter into a consent judgment with any person alleged to have violated sections 285.500 to 285.515.
(L. 2008 H.B. 1549, et al.)
